I'm considered the most vulnerable Democrat in the House. Meeting our goal this quarter is critical to our success in this race.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633f22/1a8421e1/1a5ffb6db/4918c41b/1638834682/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

Friends, _I really need your help today._ **We 're more than halfway through September, and my last quarterly fundraising deadline is in two weeks.** I'm not exaggerating when I say that meeting this goal is critical to our success in this race. I'm now considered the most vulnerable Democrat in the House, and we need to have a strong showing to keep AZ-01 blue. **We 're running behind our September online fundraising target, and we need to get back on track, but we won't make it without you.** [**Would you consider making a donation of any size today, so we can make up our lost ground?**](http://action.tomohalleran. This deadline is important for several reasons, friends. For one, my far-right opponent is attacking me and Super PACs have dropped large sums of money to defeat me. Plus, our fundraising numbers will go public after the quarter ends this month --so it is imperative that we end the last quarter of the election with a show of strength.

I'm proud to serve Arizona families in Congress, and I'll keep fighting for you, every day. [**But I 'm counting on you to make sure I can get on track to meet this goal and end the quarter strong. Please consider chipping in today.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.16_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Yours,

Tom

# _Credit to the Carolinas_
_The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes that “it is impossible not to be moved by the determination of North and South Carolinians to survive this storm and the acts of heroism on their behalf.” The editors note that “rescue teams, often led by the National Guard, have worked around the clock to save the stranded. Skilled rescuers have arrived from New York, Texas, Georgia, Missouri and elsewhere. Examples of looting have been rare.” **[Click here to read more.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE3Ljk0OTczODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxNy45NDk3Mzg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg2OTc2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.wsj.com/articles/credit-to-the-carolinas-1537137620) ** “We must give President Trump the lion’s share of credit for this good economic news. Massive deregulation has greased the skids and tax cuts have encouraged capital investment as well as buying power for consumers,” the [**_Boston Herald_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE3Ljk0OTczODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxNy45NDk3Mzg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg2OTc2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&http://www.bostonherald.com/opinion/editorials/2018/09/editorial_trump_economy_speeds_ahead) editorial board writes. “U.S. industrial production rose by a robust 0.4 percent in August, spurred by a jump in the production of automobiles, oil and natural gas. It was the third consecutive monthly increase.” In the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE3Ljk0OTczODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxNy45NDk3Mzg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg2OTc2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/opinion/op-eds/trump-is-showing-that-trade-deals-can-work-for-workers/), former CEO of Nucor steel company Dan DiMicco writes that President Trump is delivering on trade deals for American workers. “Since his early days in office, Trump outlined priorities for trade policy that include a stronger American economy, a focus on the American worker, enforcement of trade laws, and negotiations that ensure trade competitors do not take advantage of the United States.” Paul Bedard writes in the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE3Ljk0OTczODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxNy45NDk3Mzg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg2OTc2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/washington-secrets/boom-times-72-blue-collar-are-optimistic-about-future-67-happy) that “72 percent of blue collar workers and 76 percent of white collar workers are optimistic about their future,” according to a new survey by Secrets. “That recession driven grimness hanging over the workplace has lifted and now workers of all shades are feeling good about their future.” In the [**_Orlando Sentinel_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE3Ljk0OTczODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxNy45NDk3Mzg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg2OTc2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.orlandosentinel.com/opinion/os-ed-puerto-rico-maria-year-later-20180913-story.html), Luis G. Rivera-Marin, Lieutenant Governor and Secretary of State of Puerto Rico, writes that nearly one year after Hurricane Maria, the island’s recovery has been spurred by the “extraordinary operation” of our federal government. “More than $44 billion for housing, small businesses, temporary shelter, disaster unemployment, public assistance and community-development purposes has been secured by President Trump — the largest amount by any administration assigned to the island.”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE3Ljk0OTczODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxNy45NDk3Mzg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg2OTc2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE3Ljk0OTczODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxNy45NDk3Mzg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg2OTc2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE3Ljk0OTczODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxNy45NDk3Mzg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg2OTc2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

Friend,

There are now only 50 days left until the election. And this is not what I want to see:
_**" GOP stretches resources to play defense and offense"**_
We are fighting the Hollywood liberal money machine, playing defense against the fake news, and battling UNPRECEDENTED obstruction within our own capital.

Think about all the sabotage and obstruction they've done as the losing party... Just imagine what they'd do if they actually had a majority power?

body:
Hi,
Have you checked the calendar? There are just 50 days until the big election in November.
This election will have an enormous impact on Minnesota. We're electing two U.S. Senators and a new Governor. And Minnesota has some of the most important races for U.S. House in the country.
It's no wonder that both President Trump and Vice President Pence have made Minnesota a top target.
**We have to be ready.** So I'm announcing a $5,000 one-day goal to make sure we have the resources to win in November and then get back to work making a difference for Minnesotans.
**Will you make a donation before the midnight deadline? You can give at this special link:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ak-50days-r](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=DZOEkTZ4H0nSWib29%2FIJ6LGu2fbyPXBH)**
Thanks,
Amy

name: Anne Holton
subject: I'm a Virginian through and through
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

I was born in Roanoke and spent the first years of my life in Southwest Virginia. When my dad, Linwood Holton, was elected Governor, he and my mom, Jinks, moved the family up to Richmond. At the time, my dad - a Republican - was pushing to desegregate Virginia schools and move our Commonwealth forward. He believed then, and still does today, that Virginia should be a place where every man, woman, and child can thrive - and that's something he and my mom taught us kids as we were growing up.

I tell you all of this because I want you to know how much I care about Virginia, about our shared home.

**I know I email you from time to time to ask you to pitch in to Tim's campaign, and I often talk about what I've seen Tim do, and how I'm proud of him. And those things are always true - but today, I'm writing you first and foremost as a Virginian.**

I see what Tim's opponent is saying on the news and on his Twitter account. And I'll tell you, I do not like it. He wants to move Virginia backwards to a place I will tell you right now we're not going back to.

And the fact is, we have an opportunity ahead of us to make a statement about who we are and who we aren't. I know who I am, and I know who Tim is, and I can't wait to go vote for him on [November 6th.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11e9/3e0906/7311a7d4/3e360ab7/773893056/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180917_1_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+November+6th&utm_campaign=20180917_1_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&source=20180917_1_FR_AH_Anne-LDND") I'm supporting him as his wife, as an advocate for kids and teachers, as a Democrat, as a parent, as a former legal aid attorney - and most importantly, as a Virginian.

[I hope you'll join me, and make a small online contribution today to support the Virginia we believe in, a Virginia that works for all.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11e9/3e0906/7311a7d4/3e360ab6/773893056/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180917_1_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+I+hope+youll+join+me+and+make+a+small+on&utm_campaign=20180917_1_FR_AH_Anne-LDND&source=20180917_1_FR_AH_Anne-LDND")

name: Bob Casey
subject: I'm proud to share a ticket with these candidates >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e62d7/51dbcc2a/1c1d8621/3a8c8d1/3983247848/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
Here's something we're going to change this year, team: right now there are _zero women_ in Pennsylvania's Congressional delegation.

That shameful fact will become history on November 6, thanks to the seven Pennsylvania women running for Congress. I'm proud to share a ticket with Bibiana Boerio, Susan Boser, Madeleine Dean, Chrissy Houlahan, Jess King, Mary Gay Scanlon and Susan Wild, and I hope you'll join me in supporting their campaigns.

**_[Make a $5 donation to support this slate of strong congressional candidates and help make history today.](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pa-women?refcode=em_20180917_fr1_s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Electing these leaders is crucial not just to Pennsylvania, but to our nation. Every model that shows Democrats winning the House majority in November depends on winning some of these key races. One-quarter of the seats that Democrats need to flip are right here in PA, so investing in these races is absolutely critical. Securing affordable health care, defending our public education system and protecting Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security -- it's all on the line. I know that if you help me to elect these women they'll fight for these issues every day.

**So please, if you can, support Bibiana, Susan, Madeleine, Chrissy, Jess, Mary and Susan, and help elect a Congress we can be proud of:**

**_[secure.bobcasey.com/elect-PA-women](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pa-women?refcode=em_20180917_fr1_s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Bob

clean_body: "" Here's something we're going to change this year, team: right now there are zero women in Pennsylvania's Congressional delegation. That shameful fact will become history on November 6, thanks to the seven Pennsylvania women running for Congress. I'm proud to share a ticket with Bibiana Boerio, Susan Boser, Madeleine Dean, Chrissy Houlahan, Jess King, Mary Gay Scanlon and Susan Wild, and I hope you'll join me in supporting their campaigns. "" Electing these leaders is crucial not just to Pennsylvania, but to our nation. Every model that shows Democrats winning the House majority in November depends on winning some of these key races. One-quarter of the seats that Democrats need to flip are right here in PA, so investing in these races is absolutely critical. Securing affordable health care, defending our public education system and protecting Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security -- it's all on the line. I know that if you help me to elect these women they'll fight for these issues every day. So please, if you can, support Bibiana, Susan, Madeleine, Chrissy, Jess, Mary and Susan, and help elect a Congress we can be proud of: "" Thanks, Bob | Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc. name: Max Harris
subject: Our newest ad: Washington Walorski
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friends,

There's no doubt about it: Rep. Walorski's gone Washington.

What do I mean by that? She voted 11 times to let insurance companies gut coverage for people with pre-existing conditions. That would put one in three Hoosiers at risk of being denied health care.

Some things are complicated, but this is not. Everyone needs to know about this, so we've cut a new ad, and we need your help to get the message out. See it here, then share it with your friends:

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/_QRE4Clr_zAPTPEKLPDgBUy5TdOm_piUWaiWbPi5lD4=/GvN25CGy2yB9s3TDwa-Q3gf-_RWj6a2U-SkKvvkY3V8=)
**[SHARE ON FACEBOOK](https://act.myngp.com/el/_QRE4Clr_zAPTPEKLPDgBUy5TdOm_piUWaiWbPi5lD4=/GvN25CGy2yB9s3TDwa-Q3gf-_RWj6a2U-SkKvvkY3V8=) | [SHARE ON TWITTER](https://act.myngp.com/el/_QRE4Clr_zAPTPEKLPDgBUy5TdOm_piUWaiWbPi5lD4=/oqbQX8247FpYIyMn_wjH_-QOUnC5sgOMqLz94yGyUn8=)**

As a minister, Mel comforted the sick. And as the leader of a health care company, he focused on improving patient care.

In Congress, he'll be a tireless fighter for hard-working Hoosiers, and never get distracted by Washington perks or swept up in corporate lobbying. He's committed to the people of the 2nd district, and he will never forget where he came from.

[_**Mel will fight for us, but we have to fight for him first. Share this ad with your friends and make sure everyone learns about how out-of-touch Rep. Walorski has become.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/_QRE4Clr_zAPTPEKLPDgBUy5TdOm_piUWaiWbPi5lD4=/GvN25CGy2yB9s3TDwa-Q3gf-_RWj6a2U-SkKvvkY3V8=)

Thank you for all your hard work,

Max Harris
Campaign Manager, Mel Hall for Congress

name: Mayor Pete
subject: a partner in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
All of these reasons -- and countless more -- are why we must do everything we can to send Joe back to the Senate for another term. |
---

| | Hey Peter, I won't beat around the bush -- I'm writing to ask you to **[make a quick donation to Senator Joe Donnelly's re-election campaign](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2cb4/7377f838/3bfbca9c/51f83212/1912430873/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbmayor?refcode=20180917.1&amount=10")**. Give me just a minute, and I'll tell you why I'm asking.

**When Joe was serving in the House of Representatives, he worked for the same Hoosiers I now serve as mayor of South Bend -- just like he still does today as our Democratic senator.** I do my best for the town I grew up in, and whether it's bringing good-paying jobs back to the city or investing in our infrastructure, it's good to have a partner in the Senate who can back me up.

Because if Joe hadn't been there to **fight for the auto rescue** , even more of us would have lost a job and a paycheck during the Great Recession. And if Joe hadn't been there to **stand against repealing the Affordable Care Act** , South Bend residents, Hoosiers, and Americans across the country who have pre-existing conditions or who rely on health care programs like Indiana's HIP 2.0 would have been kicked to the curb.

But as a former Naval intelligence officer who served in Afghanistan, there's another reason I'm supporting Joe. **He has been a consistent champion for veterans and servicemembers** , from working to pass the Servicemember and Veteran Mental Health Care Package to pushing for the opening of a new VA health center in St. Joseph County.

All of these reasons -- and countless more -- are why we must do everything we can to send Joe back to the Senate for another term. But Joe's facing a multi-millionaire Republican opponent who is personally backed by President Trump, so re-electing him won't be easy.

**There are just seven weeks left before Election Day, and Joe needs your help to get over the finish line. Will you pitch in to give his campaign the resources they need to contact voters all over Indiana and WIN on November 6th?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Mayor Pete

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:

name: Adam Spanberger
subject: 50 days to go until the election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
It feels like just yesterday that Abby and a small team of friends launched this campaign from our kitchen. In the 14 months since, she's met thousands of people, attended hundreds of events, and somehow, we're now 50 short days away from the election.
| | Peter, It feels like just yesterday that Abby and a small team of friends launched this campaign from our kitchen. In the 14 months since, she's met thousands of people, attended hundreds of events, and somehow, **we 're now 50 short days away from the election.** [**Peter, to mark this important milestone, can you make a donation to the campaign today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ug8dN_1PCqwsVppQ-7phABCRxaniKl9SL3DlB1MSveM=/YDzGxALj-PZ2dubRmOYYFYBNVfoaRhYVKcMq9xsBh-U=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.17_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Our team has set a goal of [**100 grassroots donations**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ug8dN_1PCqwsVppQ-7phABCRxaniKl9SL3DlB1MSveM=/YDzGxALj-PZ2dubRmOYYFYBNVfoaRhYVKcMq9xsBh-U=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.17_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) to equip us with the resources we need for these final 50 days of knocking doors, making phone calls, and persuading undecided voters. Fifty days might sound like a while, but I promise, in campaign time, it's far from it. Our race is within the margin of error, according to a recent _New York Times_ poll, and with many voters still undecided, we're working hard each day to introduce every single one of them to Abby, her story, and her positive vision for our district. Time will go quickly. Thankfully, enthusiasm on the ground is palpable -- truly amazing, when you stop and think about it. Central Virginia was inundated with rain this past weekend, but the weather didn't stop our team of volunteers from getting out there and knocking voters' doors. It's that enthusiasm -- and your grassroots support -- that will power us through the next 50 days and allow us to turn this toss-up race into a win. [**Peter, consider making a donation to help us if you can.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ug8dN_1PCqwsVppQ-7phABCRxaniKl9SL3DlB1MSveM=/YDzGxALj-PZ2dubRmOYYFYBNVfoaRhYVKcMq9xsBh-U=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.17_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Adam [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ug8dN_1PCqwsVppQ-7phABCRxaniKl9SL3DlB1MSveM=/YDzGxALj-PZ2dubRmOYYFYBNVfoaRhYVKcMq9xsBh-U=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.17_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ug8dN_1PCqwsVppQ-7phABCRxaniKl9SL3DlB1MSveM=/YDzGxALj-PZ2dubRmOYYFYBNVfoaRhYVKcMq9xsBh-U=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ug8dN_1PCqwsVppQ-7phABCRxaniKl9SL3DlB1MSveM=/ssGU7xWQY6k9o5ZgNn3HAvGbZunugsz6abQExXN7pw4=)_

name: Team Inslee
subject: Join Jay's focus group!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
The way we win is by listening to our grassroots supporters. Here is your opportunity.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bdeb/2f5ea88d/754692ae/2cbc4178/1411809146/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/inslee-focus-group?utm_source=ema_2018-09-12_focus-group-survey&source=ema_2018-09-12_focus-group-survey&utm_campaign=focus-group-survey&utm_medium=ema") Friend, If we have learned anything over the past two years, it's that we need to listen to our grassroots supporters. Your input helps guide our decisions, and ultimately, our success. That's why we are putting together a focus group. We'd love to hear from our supporters about the direction we should take from here. Because folks like you have a huge stake in our progressive movement, we want **you** to be a part of the focus group. [**You can join by taking this survey.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bdeb/2f5ea88d/754692ae/2cbc4178/1411809146/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/inslee-focus-group?utm_source=ema_2018-09-12_focus-group-survey&source=ema_2018-09-12_focus-group-survey&utm_campaign=focus-group-survey&utm_medium=ema") Currently, one of our main goals is to make sure voters know about the work Governor Inslee and his fellow Democratic governors are doing. They are fighting to stop Trump and create real progress in the states, and we need everyone to know just how hard they are fighting. As an informed Democrat yourself, how would you best spread the word about our movement to others? | [JOIN OUR FOCUS GROUP »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bdeb/2f5ea88d/754692ae/2cbc4178/1411809146/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/inslee-focus-group?utm_source=ema_2018-09-12_focus-group-survey&source=ema_2018-09-12_focus-group-survey&utm_campaign=focus-group-survey&utm_medium=ema")
---
We are here to make sure a blue wave sweeps the country in 2018. That is why we have created the focus group to pinpoint exactly what it is that matters most to our nation, and where we want to take the future from here. Together, we need to best determine what our country needs at this critical time. We are relying on supporters like yourself to spread the word and help us pave a path in 2018. Your feedback is vital in determining our next decisions.
Thank you for your input.
Team Inslee

name: Jason Yates
subject: Happy Constitution Day!
body:
| | Going strong at 231 years.
---
| Today we celebrate the founding document that has guided our nation for 231 years! From May to July of 1787, twelve of the thirteen colonies (Rhode Island abstained) met at Independence Hall in Philadelphia to revise the Articles of Confederation. Under the Articles of Confederation, the federal government lacked the proper authority to carry out some core functions of government such as conducting foreign relations and raising revenue. So, a new form of federal government needed to be created that would provide the proper authority while also protecting states’ rights. After an additional two long months of intense debate, on September 17th, 1787, a total of 39 delegates signed the Constitution. The Constitution established the foundation of America – now the longest running Constitutional Republic in the history of the world. The founding fathers did not believe it was by accident that 39 men were able to agree on the Constitution. Many of the signers credit Divine Providence. _“I do not believe that the Constitution was the offspring of inspiration, but I am as perfectly satisfied that the Union of the States in its form and adoption is as much the work of a Divine Providence as any of the miracles recorded in the Old and New Testament._
–Benjamin Rush, Signer of the Constitution _And founding father Alexander Hamilton said, “For my own part, I sincerely esteem it a system which without the finger of God never could have been suggested and agreed upon by such a diversity of interests.”_
–Alexander Hamilton, Founding Father Was God’s hand of blessing on this document and the Constitutional Convention? What we do know from a written account of a member inside the Constitutional Convention is that Benjamin Franklin suggested the delegates begin the convention with prayer. _“Mr. President, I will suggest another matter; and I am really surprised that it has not been proposed by some other member at an earlier period of our deliberations. I will suggest, Mr. President, that propriety of nominating and appointing, before we separate, a chaplain to this Convention, whose duty it shall be uniformly to assemble with us, and introduce the business of each day by and address to the Creator of the universe, and the Governor of all nations, beseeching Him to preside in our council, enlighten our minds with a portion of heavenly wisdom, influence our hearts with a love of truth and justice, and crown our labors with complete and abundant success!”_
–Benjamin Franklin Many of our founding fathers, if not all of them, humbled themselves before the Lord in prayer to seek His wisdom and guidance for our new nation. Today, we again need a covering of prayer across our country if we hope to live in peace as a nation blessed by the Lord. I want to encourage you to do two simple things:
* Take some time today to [read the Constitution](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=OCk86SWzT4MaRDZ3seWv_7twu7V_njl7A995Nya1ZvQ-xGANSbHjoWvtgZZTH6Wi42-SznOyXWrO1j2VXCYTdA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180917com01&n=1) with your family. Understand what is in this founding document and discuss the aspects of our Constitution that have produced longevity, freedom, and peace.
* Then most importantly, pray. [Pray for our leaders](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUWAxPKyT6pyCRSr2EF9a1HCu4Jv3LTSUnayWqJSpnBd9u0fPZRpX27GHs8BGz1cSYGOkdP1GFHtYEwT98tMwto&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180917com01&n=2) that they would seek God’s wisdom for the future of our country and pray for the upcoming elections that people of faith would prayerfully cast their ballots.

Today, as we celebrate Constitution Day, I’m grateful for this incredible nation we live in and the Constitution that has guided us. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180917com01&n=3)

The White House • September 17, 2018
## After Hurricane Florence
##
##
**American resiliency is on full display** in the aftermath of Hurricane Florence. Over the weekend, America watched as brave first responders put their own lives at risk to help others across the Carolinas and elsewhere. **As the flooding continues** in North and South Carolina, rescue workers remain on the job with full support from Federal agencies. President Donald J. Trump put extensive preparations in place to assist state and local governments ahead of the storm, including nearly 4,000 Federal Employees—more than 1,000 of them from the Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA). **Today** , **President Trump signed** an Emergency Declaration for**[South Carolina](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE3Ljk1MDA3MzMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxNy45NTAwNzMzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3MzI3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-approves-south-carolina-disaster-declaration-2/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)**. He did the same for [**North Carolina**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE3Ljk1MDA3MzMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxNy45NTAwNzMzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3MzI3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-approves-north-carolina-disaster-declaration-2/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) on Saturday. Such assistance can include grants for temporary housing and home repairs, low-cost loans to cover uninsured property losses, and other programs to help individuals and businesses recover from the storm. **“The Federal Government has dispatched** nearly 20,000 Federal and Military personnel to assist in the response and recovery effort,” President Trump said today. “Every relevant Federal resource is marshaled to help those in need. Many lives have been saved already . . . The job they’re doing is incredible.” [**Watch President Trump’s latest statement on the recovery effort.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE3Ljk1MDA3MzMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxNy45NTAwNzMzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3MzI3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1041783700466425856) **More** : [**How a massive Federal response mobilized ahead of Hurricane Florence**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE3Ljk1MDA3MzMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxNy45NTAwNzMzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3MzI3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-mobilized-massive-federal-response-ahead-hurricane-florence/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
## Update: 4.2 million opportunities and counting
##
**This afternoon, Ivanka Trump** helped lead the first meeting of the National Council for the American Worker at the White House. Since President Trump unveiled the Pledge to America’s Workers in July, 110 companies and organizations have committed to more than 4.2 million opportunities for America’s workforce. **As the American economy booms** , “we don’t want to leave workers behind,” the President said today—“and that won’t happen . . . Nobody’s going to be left behind.” **With** **job openings increasing** at a record pace, companies today face a distinct challenge finding American workers with specific skill sets to fill these roles. Affordable training and better access to employment information can help more citizens move into such jobs, allowing both blue- and white-collar workers to benefit from our record-breaking economy and earn bigger paychecks. **“American workers have always seized change** as an opportunity,” [**Ivanka Trump wrote**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE3Ljk1MDA3MzMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxNy45NTAwNzMzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3MzI3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/training-jobs-tomorrow/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) this summer. “They built the Model T, put men on the moon and connected the world via the internet. If we give American students and workers the training and opportunities they need, they will continue to be the greatest pioneers of the 21st century.” **[See how President Trump is fulfilling his Pledge to American Workers.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE3Ljk1MDA3MzMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxNy45NTAwNzMzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg3MzI3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/pledge-to-americas-workers/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **
## Photo of the Day

clean_body: | | The White House • September 17, 2018 After Hurricane Florence American resiliency is on full display in the aftermath of Hurricane Florence. Over the weekend, America watched as brave first responders put their own lives at risk to help others across the Carolinas and elsewhere. As the flooding continues in North and South Carolina, rescue workers remain on the job with full support from Federal agencies. President Donald J. Trump put extensive preparations in place to assist state and local governments ahead of the storm, including nearly 4,000 Federal Employees—more than 1,000 of them from the Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA). Today , President Trump signed an Emergency Declaration for. He did the same for on Saturday. Such assistance can include grants for temporary housing and home repairs, low-cost loans to cover uninsured property losses, and other programs to help individuals and businesses recover from the storm. “The Federal Government has dispatched nearly 20,000 Federal and Military personnel to assist in the response and recovery effort,” President Trump said today. “Every relevant Federal resource is marshaled to help those in need. Many lives have been saved already . . . The job they’re doing is incredible.” More : Update: 4.2 million opportunities and counting This afternoon, Ivanka Trump helped lead the first meeting of the National Council for the American Worker at the White House. Since President Trump unveiled the Pledge to America’s Workers in July, 110 companies and organizations have committed to more than 4.2 million opportunities for America’s workforce. As the American economy booms , “we don’t want to leave workers behind,” the President said today—“and that won’t happen . . . Nobody’s going to be left behind.” With job openings increasing at a record pace, companies today face a distinct challenge finding American workers with specific skill sets to fill these roles. Affordable training and better access to employment information can help more citizens move into such jobs, allowing both blue- and white-collar workers to benefit from our record-breaking economy and earn bigger paychecks. “American workers have always seized change as an opportunity,” this summer. “They built the Model T, put men on the moon and connected the world via the internet. If we give American students and workers the training and opportunities they need, they will continue to be the greatest pioneers of the 21st century.” Photo of the Day Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead President Donald J. name: Tabitha Isner
subject: So, Friend, how do you feel about guns?
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62300/images/Logos/Logo3.PNG]

Dear Friend,

I'm so tired of being told that we're just too different to get along. Pundits make it seem like Democrats and Republicans live on different planets. They make it seem like we can't even be in the same room without fighting like cats and dogs. But they're wrong.

On August 31st, at a gun range in Daleville, I gathered a group of people with a diverse set of perspectives about guns. People who have shot all their lives, people who learned to shoot for self-protection, people who have never shot before, people who have lost loved ones to gun violence. We took pistol lessons together and then we talked. For hours. On camera.

https://youtu.be/VHtYc7hjSDw [https://youtu.be/VHtYc7hjSDw]

This video shows what happens when people listen to one another and discuss real practical solutions rather than relying on partisan talking points.

And the results? Well, watch for yourself.

For me, this video proves what I already knew, that the people of Alabama's Second District are kind, reasonable, and solutions-oriented. And they want a leader who is too.

That's why I'm running to represent AL-02 in Congress. But I need your help to make it happen. Will you donate today?

-Tabitha K. Isner

clean_body: They say we can’t do it. They say we can’t win in November. They say it’s impossible. But here are the facts: They were wrong about President Trump... Friend, I know what the media says. They say we can’t do it. They say we can’t win in November. They say it’s impossible. But here are the facts: They were wrong about President Trump and Senator Ron Johnson in 2016 and they were wrong about us in the primary. Is it it any shock they’re WRONG now? I know we’re winners, Friend. And if we work together, we can defeat Tammy Baldwin. But it’s time to get real. We MUST step up our fundraising efforts and give it all we've got to prevent a Baldwin victory. That’s why I’m putting together an EMERGENCY FUND to get us through the next few weeks without any gaps in our efforts. We know Tammy Baldwin is cashing big checks from liberal, San Francisco donors and her bank account is staying full with plenty of cash to attack us. So we have to be out there doing everything we can to motivate conservatives, spread our message, and get out the vote. I know Wisconsinites voted to see an agenda that finally puts America first when we voted for President Trump last November. And I know Tammy Baldwin chooses to obstruct that agenda. She won’t confirm judges who uphold the Constitution. She stands in the way of providing patients with more healthcare options and lower prices. And Friend, she didn’t even vote for tax reform! And I want every Wisconsinite to hear it, too! Tammy Baldwin has let us down, and she can’t hide from her record as long as we’re out there making it loud and clear. I know I can’t do it without you, Friend. Your support means everything. Thank you in advance. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Kathy Manning
subject: Help the victims of Hurricane Florence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Florence continues it's slow crawl across North Carolina, leaving devastation for many of our friends, family, and neighbors. It will take time for many areas in North Carolina to recover from the damage the storm is leaving behind. Our thoughts and prayers will continue to go out to those affected -- and our thanks go out to all the brave first-responders working to save lives in the storm's path. Today, I wanted to let you know how you can make a difference here. **Many organizations are working to help the victims of Hurricane Florence, to get them much-needed supplies, and support recovery efforts.** Here are a few of the organizations taking donations to help aid in the recovery efforts:
* [**United Way of North Carolina**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279b9/e3b7d3/5d784310/25554564/3308842137/VEsH/ "https://app.mobilecause.com/form/On0MvA")
* [**North Carolina Community Foundation**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279b9/e3b7d3/5d784310/2555456b/3308842137/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/north-carolina-community-foundation-disaster-relief-fund-1")
* [**Food Bank of Central & Eastern North Carolina**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279b9/e3b7d3/5d784310/2555456a/3308842137/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/food-bank-of-central---eastern-north-carolina-1")

It's times of greatest challenge that often bring out the best in us. This is a time to come together. Thanks for doing what you can. Kathy
---

Friend,
We choose to be a part of a movement where we can talk with people even if we don't agree with them, discussing potential solutions to the problems we face.

name: Team Scholten
subject: RE: Help me call Steve King out to debate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
It's been ten days since J.D. challenged Steve King to a series of three debates, and so far King is refusing to show up, just like he refuses to show up for the people of this district. He doesn't like to debate, he doesn't do Town Halls, and he doesn't do public events. How can someone be a representative for the people if they refuse to show up or listen to their concerns? **We deserve better. We deserve to see debates between Steve King and J.D. Scholten. **
If you haven't signed the petition yet to demand a debate, **please do so[ _HERE_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2225508/11681480/-1480649960?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTQ3NjMzYy1kY2JhLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s0JiCMiUozzpjRz0hKHqpGWZ-lXv6j6ErnA7p0tO8sY=).**
Once you've signed the petition, please share this with your friends so we can put as much pressure on Steve King as possible.
**Here are three quick and easy ways you can help to do that right now:**
**1) Forward this email to a friend.**
**2) Share[ _THIS POST_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2225509/11681481/1439272422?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTQ3NjMzYy1kY2JhLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s0JiCMiUozzpjRz0hKHqpGWZ-lXv6j6ErnA7p0tO8sY=) on Facebook**
**3) Retweet[ _THIS TWEET_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2225510/11681482/-1493999955?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTQ3NjMzYy1kY2JhLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s0JiCMiUozzpjRz0hKHqpGWZ-lXv6j6ErnA7p0tO8sY=) on Twitter.**
Thank you for helping to get the word out. With your help, we can get Steve King out too!
Standing Tall for All,
Team Scholten
\---------------------------------------------------------------------
Peter,
**It’s been one week since I issued a debate challenge to Steve King.** He responded by saying he wouldn’t debate me because, as he put it, “there’s not a clear division on issues.” If Steve King truly thinks there isn’t a clear division on where he and I stand on the issues, he’s even more out of touch than we thought. Here’s just a few of the places where we differ:
* Steve King calls the recently passed tax bill his “best vote.” I think it was a scam perpetuated on the working class. It’s going to add $1.9 trillion to our deficit and nearly all of the tax cuts go to those at the top. I stand for tax reform that benefits the working class.
* Rep. King has voted to take away health care from thousands of Iowans with pre-existing conditions. I want to ensure access to affordable health care for all Iowans.
* Farm incomes are collapsing to 2002 levels and Steve King has done nothing about it. I’ll actually challenge the corporate consolidation of our markets that is squeezing our farmers, and I oppose the disastrous trade wars that Iowa is bearing the brunt of.
* Steve King doesn’t show up. He’s missed 39% of House Agriculture Committee hearings and 80% of Small Business Committee hearings. He doesn’t do Town Halls or events with the general public and now, he won’t even participate in a debate! I’ve done two 39 county tours in the last year and am launching a third 39 county Town Hall tour in the next few days. (You can’t fake showing up.)
* Steve King practices politics of division and fear. **I want to work for ALL of the people here to build our district’s future together.**

There are significant differences on the issues between myself and Steve King, and the voters deserve to hear loud and clear the differences between the incumbent and the candidate running to replace them. Please sign this petition today, asking that Steve King do his democratic duty and participate in three debates. Our goal is to collect as many signatures as possible to pressure him into doing what is right and honor the great American tradition of political debates. **Our voters deserve nothing less.**
[****You can access the petition demanding a** debate HERE.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2225511/11681483/-1480649960?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTQ3NjMzYy1kY2JhLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s0JiCMiUozzpjRz0hKHqpGWZ-lXv6j6ErnA7p0tO8sY=)
Standing Tall for All,
J.D. Scholten
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2225512/11681484/-761428161?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTQ3NjMzYy1kY2JhLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s0JiCMiUozzpjRz0hKHqpGWZ-lXv6j6ErnA7p0tO8sY=)

Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
Scholten4Iowa

Sioux City, IA 51102

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/7d88a086-bcba-e811-bce7-000d3a12b7e6/6947633c-dcba-e811-bce7-000d3a12b7e6?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTQ3NjMzYy1kY2JhLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI3ZTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s0JiCMiUozzpjRz0hKHqpGWZ-lXv6j6ErnA7p0tO8sY=&id=109918160&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

subject: FWD: I'm a Virginian through and through
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

Anne Holton sent you a note this morning and since then, hundreds of you have stepped up - putting us almost $10,000 closer to our goal!

[We would love to reach out to Anne and tell her that her note inspired hundreds of Virginians to step up and raise more than $10,000. But we can't do that without you. Help us get there by clicking here.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1196/3e0906/7363ffed/3e360129/195253121/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180917_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-fwd-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+We+would+love+to+reach+out+to+Anne+and+t&utm_campaign=20180917_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-fwd-LDND&source=20180917_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-fwd-LDND")

Thanks!

_Team Kaine_
* * *
FROM: Anne Holton
SUBJECT: I'm a Virginian through and through Derek,

I was born in Roanoke and spent the first years of my life in Southwest Virginia. When my dad, Linwood Holton, was elected Governor, he and my mom, Jinks, moved the family up to Richmond. At the time, my dad - a Republican - was pushing to desegregate Virginia schools and move our Commonwealth forward. He believed then, and still does today, that Virginia should be a place where every man, woman, and child can thrive - and that's something he and my mom taught us kids as we were growing up.

I tell you all of this because I want you to know how much I care about Virginia, about our shared home.

**I know I email you from time to time to ask you to pitch in to Tim's campaign, and I often talk about what I've seen Tim do, and how I'm proud of him. And those things are always true - but today, I'm writing you first and foremost as a Virginian.**

I see what Tim's opponent is saying on the news and on his Twitter account. And I'll tell you, I do not like it. He wants to move Virginia backwards to a place I will tell you right now we're not going back to.

And the fact is, we have an opportunity ahead of us to make a statement about who we are and who we aren't. I know who I am, and I know who Tim is, and I can't wait to go vote for him on [November 6th.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1196/3e0906/7363ffed/3e360128/195253121/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180917_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-fwd-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+November+6th&utm_campaign=20180917_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-fwd-LDND&source=20180917_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-fwd-LDND") I'm supporting him as his wife, as an advocate for kids and teachers, as a Democrat, as a parent, as a former legal aid attorney - and most importantly, as a Virginian.

[I hope you'll join me, and make a small online contribution today to support the Virginia we believe in, a Virginia that works for all.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1196/3e0906/7363ffed/3e36012f/195253121/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180917_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-fwd-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+I+hope+youll+join+me+and+make+a+small+on&utm_campaign=20180917_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-fwd-LDND&source=20180917_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-fwd-LDND")

**The month of September is a critical time for any campaign, and we 're in the middle of a fundraising push to get $44,600 more by [Tuesday,](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1196/3e0906/7363ffed/3e36012e/195253121/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180917_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-fwd-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Tuesday&utm_campaign=20180917_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-fwd-LDND&source=20180917_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-fwd-LDND") so your donation will mean the world to us:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1196/3e0906/7363ffed/3e36012d/195253121/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180917_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-fwd-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180917_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-fwd-LDND&source=20180917_2_FR_TEAM_Anne-fwd-LDND")

clean_body: | | Derek, Anne Holton sent you a note this morning and since then, hundreds of you have stepped up - putting us almost $10,000 closer to our goal! "" Thanks! Team Kaine FROM: Anne Holton SUBJECT: I'm a Virginian through and through Derek, I was born in Roanoke and spent the first years of my life in Southwest Virginia. When my dad, Linwood Holton, was elected Governor, he and my mom, Jinks, moved the family up to Richmond. At the time, my dad - a Republican - was pushing to desegregate Virginia schools and move our Commonwealth forward. He believed then, and still does today, that Virginia should be a place where every man, woman, and child can thrive - and that's something he and my mom taught us kids as we were growing up. I tell you all of this because I want you to know how much I care about Virginia, about our shared home. I know I email you from time to time to ask you to pitch in to Tim's campaign, and I often talk about what I've seen Tim do, and how I'm proud of him. And those things are always true - but today, I'm writing you first and foremost as a Virginian. I see what Tim's opponent is saying on the news and on his Twitter account. And I'll tell you, I do not like it. He wants to move Virginia backwards to a place I will tell you right now we're not going back to. And the fact is, we have an opportunity ahead of us to make a statement about who we are and who we aren't. I know who I am, and I know who Tim is, and I can't wait to go vote for him on "" I'm supporting him as his wife, as an advocate for kids and teachers, as a Democrat, as a parent, as a former legal aid attorney - and most importantly, as a Virginian. "" The month of September is a critical time for any campaign, and we 're in the middle of a fundraising push to get $44,600 more by "" so your donation will mean the world to us: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" "" Thank you so much for reading. Anne | "" "" ""

name: Jody Casey, betofortexas.com
subject: For these final seven weeks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

If Beto wins in November, we’ll make history: it will be the first time a
Democrat was elected statewide in Texas in over two decades. We’ll send
Beto to the Senate and chart a new path forward for our state and our
country.

We can win this race. Recent polls show Beto within single digits of Ted
Cruz -- and one poll even shows Beto behind by just a single point.

If we win, it’ll be in part because Beto worked his tail off -- traveling
tirelessly to each of Texas’ 254 counties to hear directly from Texans
about the issues that matter to them, their families and their community.

But Beto isn’t running this race alone. Tens of thousands of grassroots
supporters like you across the
country are running alongside him as our partners in this
campaign.

You’re making calls to voters and knocking on doors. You’re pitching in
$5, $10, $25 bucks at a time to make sure we have the resources we need to
run a winning campaign. You’re stepping up, digging deep and pushing us to
victory.

Right now, we’re just seven weeks away from Election Day. We don’t have
much time to push Beto over the top. So I have an important request:

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/7279?refcode=em20180917&t=1001&akid=10807%2E444211%2EkanZkC ]We’re counting on 10,000 grassroots supporters to dig a little deeper
and commit to giving a weekly recurring donation to Beto’s campaign until
Election Day. Click here to set up your weekly recurring contribution for
the final 7 weeks of this campaign.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/7279?refcode=em20180917&t=1002&akid=10807%2E444211%2EkanZkC ]Become a weekly donor »

Beto doesn’t take a dime from PACs or special interests because he never
wants you to wonder who he answers to. That means we rely on individual,
grassroots donations from real people to fully fund our campaign. Whether
you can afford to give $100, $25 or even just $1 per week until the
election, every single dollar really makes a difference.

Unlike Ted Cruz, if we miss our goals, we can’t rely on a super PAC or
special-interest group to sweep in and save us. It’s us against Ted Cruz
and the ten outside groups that have pledged to help him.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/7279?refcode=em20180917&t=1003&akid=10807%2E444211%2EkanZkC ]Please consider becoming one of our supporters who donates
automatically every week until the election. We've only got 7 weeks to
win.

When we know we can count on this confirmed set of donations, we’re able
to better plan where we spend the resources that are going to make a
difference in this neck-and-neck race. Thank you.

Sincerely,

Jody Casey
Campaign Manager
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/7279?refcode=em20180917&t=1004&akid=10807%2E444211%2EkanZkC ]Become a weekly donor »

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20180917footer&t=1005&akid=10807%2E444211%2EkanZkC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=10807%2E444211%2EkanZkC

P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923
